acceptanceCriteria.text: User can browse and select a Writing task
Credits are reserved before scoring begins
Report includes overall estimated band, criterion breakdown, explanation, and next steps
Failed score attempts trigger automatic credit refund

snapshot.description: Writing tasks browsable by type, difficulty, and estimated time. Editor with timer and draft state. AI scoring on submit with credit reservation. Report with criterion breakdown and next steps.
snapshot.title: Module 3: Writing practice
